title: Apples
html:
May 2021 Yahir stacked-column dump: groceries (oranges, pasilla peppers, chicken, mushrooms, shrimp, trash bags), errands (read, program, "Dave solidification" — likely Dave Selinger follow-up), and "Prom shit with mom." End of senior year.

TL;DR

  • Stacked grocery + work + family columns in one note — the recurring Yahir note pattern.
  • "Dave solidification" pre-dates the explicit dave selinger mentor relationship in the corpus.
  • Senior-year prom timing — close to the 2021 graduation arc.

yahir gonzalez · mom yahir · dave selinger · 2021 graduation · corvallis or
